历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 2711 → 4041 → 1236 → 716 → 569. Since 2023, rankings have significantly moved forward. After the 2024 new Gaokao reform in Jiangxi, the Physics Category ranking jumped from 1236 to 716, and further moved forward to 569 in 2025, with a cumulative forward movement of about 667 positions over the past two years, indicating intensifying competition. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 569. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangxi's Physics Category: 2021: 70 → 2022: 52 → 2023: 38 → 2024: 33 → 2025: 27, showing a year-on-year reduction trend. The 2026 plan is 27, unchanged from 2025, indicating stable enrollment without further reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 11th in 2021 → 13th in 2022 → 13th in 2023 → 16th in 2024 → 14th in 2025 → 12th in 2026, consistently among the top 20 top-tier engineering universities in China, with recent rankings recovering. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving university management-related public opinion. It ranks 10th in Douyin comprehensive popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting high application attention. In 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (candidates reported a sharp drop), but the ranking has clearly recovered in 2025, and the abnormal impact has largely subsided. It has 4 A+ disciplines (Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering), 6 A disciplines (Instrument Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Mathematics, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Management Science and Engineering), and 5 A- disciplines, totaling 17 A- and above, with top-tier engineering strength highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and other majors continue to be highly recommended. The total number of Gaokao candidates in Jiangxi Province in 2026 is approximately 474,900, a slight increase from 2025 (approximately 472,480), leading to a small rise in the competition base. Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang Province (Northeast China), while Jiangxi Province is in East China, making it a long-distance cross-province enrollment. The university's enrollment proportion in Jiangxi is about 3%-4%, which is moderately low, and the geographical distance has some inhibitory effect on applications but limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward movement of historical rankings (cumulative forward movement of about 667 positions over the past two years), the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight increase in total candidate numbers, high Douyin popularity reflecting rising attention, and the university's Soft Science ranking recovery to 12th, competition is expected to further intensify. Based on the 2025 baseline of 569, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 539, with a range of 478–600.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Technology Top Talent Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Academician Special Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top Class, HKU Excellence Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Brain-Machine Intelligence)
- Artificial Intelligence (Zhongguancun Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI Academician Special Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Embodied Intelligence (Greater Bay Area Class) (Shenzhen Campus)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligent Systems Academician Special Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 478–600, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, with Tier 1 majors as a sprint and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 478), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as the Future Technology Top Talent Class and Academician Special Class. If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 600), it is recommended to mainly target Tier 2 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 1355 → 1110 → 1011 → 966, moving forward continuously for four consecutive years, with a cumulative forward shift of about 389 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 966; the enrollment plan for this university in Jiangxi Province for History Category: 2022: 6 students → 2023: 10 students → 2024: 15 students → 2025: 10 students; the 2026 plan is 8 students, a reduction of 2 students (-20%) compared to 2025, with a small enrollment scale, and the reduction will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985/211/Double First-Class; ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science Rankings, a top national engineering university, although strong in engineering, the 985 level still has strong appeal for liberal arts candidates; reputation in 2026 is neutral/mixed; Douyin popularity ranks 10th overall (high heat), with high overall attention; no abnormal signals in History Category admissions; Harbin Institute of Technology is primarily engineering-focused, with limited discipline evaluation data for liberal arts, the Economics and Management Pilot Class corresponds to Management Science and Engineering (A) and Business Administration (not individually rated), with relatively strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of Economics/Management/Business Administration majors is divided and wait-and-see; the total number of Gaokao candidates in Jiangxi Province in 2026 is about 474,900, a slight increase from 2025; the number of History Category candidates is estimated at about 207,000 based on recent proportions, with a slight increase in the competition base; cross-province long-distance enrollment (Heilongjiang → Jiangxi), geographical distance has some inhibitory effect on liberal arts applications, but the 985 level can partially offset it.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering key factors such as the continuous forward shift of historical rankings (cumulative forward shift of about 389 places over four consecutive years), a 20% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, and a slight increase in the total number of candidates, competition is expected to further intensify. Based on the 2025 baseline of 966, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 830, with a range of 735–925.
